title: thymus broussonetii var. hannonis
intro: Thymus broussonetii var. hannonis, also known as Hannon's thyme or Thymus hannonis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a small, shrubby perennial with a woody base and narrow, pointed leaves, typically found in dry, rocky areas. The medicinal properties of Thymus broussonetii var. hannonis include its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, with herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils being used to harness its medicinal properties.
